_comment: One row from learning_store after stage5_learn.merge. JSON columns are stored as strings in SQLite; shown here parsed.
priority_topics: Long-form comparison of AI receptionist vendors for UK housing associations

do_not_repeat: Avoid thin topical coverage vs the brief—last draft scored low on topic depth; add substantiation and examples.
quality_patterns: Strong topical coverage of AI receptionists for UK SMEs with practical sections on benefits and implementation.
